doc_title: Can Large Language Models Really Improve by Self-critiquing Their Own Plans?

items.evidence_span: Even though initial anecdotal results showed promise, systematic studies revealed their incompetency in reasoning - be it planning [12] or in simple arithmetic or logic
or in simple arithmetic or logic [3]
The current works [15, 10, 14] exhibit considerable optimism about using LLMs to critique their own candidate generations
The current works [15, 10, 14] exhibit considerable optimism about using LLMs to critique their own candidate generations
The current works [15, 10, 14] exhibit considerable optimism about using LLMs to critique their own candidate generations
For our study, we use GPT-4 [9] as both the generator and verifier
